rationale: Educ. Code §49.202 governs voter approval for educating nonresident students with local tax revenues. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The ballot shall be printed to permit voting for or against the proposition: "Authorizing the board of trustees of ________ School District to educate students of other school districts with local tax revenues."
_note: No conflict; rule concerns voter approval for nonresident student education agreements, not homestead exemption levels.
